project.name: Demo Decentralized Forge Project
project.description: A local-only fixture showing how a project can be discovered, cloned, discussed, patched, and released without GitHub as the authority.

issues.title: Define portable project identity
issues.author: npub1qqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqfixture
issues.summary: Choose how maintainer authority is represented across Nostr, Radicle, DID, and SSH identities.

patches.title: Add static registry renderer
patches.author: npub1contributorfixture0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
patches.summary: Prototype a deterministic stdlib renderer for project registry fixtures.

content_addresses.notes: CIDv1 raw/base32 shape computed locally from the fixture bytes; no IPFS add, fetch, pin, gateway, or network availability was verified.

availability.notes: Local file fixture only; no paid pinning/storage, wallet, Filecoin/Arweave spend, or durability claim.

verification.notes: Fake local attestation fixture for data modeling only; not a DSSE envelope, not signed, not uploaded to Rekor, not a SLSA compliance claim.

verification_states.evidence: fixtures/example-project.registry.json rendered by scripts/render_project_page.py and covered by stdlib tests
verification_states.claim_boundary: Local static registry fixture only; not a hosted production forge or signed authority.
verification_states.notes: Renderer output is deterministic local HTML from fixture data.

verification_states.evidence: fixtures/nostr-repo-announcement.json, fixtures/nostr-collaboration-events.json, and fixtures/nostr-repo-state-status.json parsed locally by scripts/nip34_adapter.py
verification_states.claim_boundary: Dry-run NIP-34/NIP-01 shapes only; no relay publish/readback, live relay fetch, signing, event-id replacement, or public status semantics claim.
verification_states.notes: Possible event IDs in conformance reports are local references only.

verification_states.evidence: Radicle source/manpage/examples inspected from /tmp/radicle-heartwood at commit 90aaec1c9eee77a0beebece48f460c1424c1c8bd
verification_states.claim_boundary: Mapping placeholder only; no rad CLI replay, real RID verification, seed publish, or network verification.
verification_states.notes: Kept as a bridge to the dedicated Radicle-backed fixture.

verification_states.evidence: SHA-256 and CIDv1 raw/base32-compatible value computed from fixtures/local-release-artifact.txt by local tests
verification_states.claim_boundary: Local content-address metadata only; no IPFS add/fetch/pin/gateway availability, paid storage, or durability claim.
verification_states.notes: CID shape matches fixture bytes but network availability is unverified.

verification_states.evidence: local-fake CI records and fake provenance/attestation strings in fixtures/example-project.registry.json
verification_states.claim_boundary: Synthetic local schema data only; no hosted CI, public commit status, real signature, Sigstore/cosign/in-toto verification, Rekor upload, or SLSA claim.
verification_states.notes: The fake attestation repeats fixture coordinates for parser/renderer tests.

ci_checks.name: stdlib fixture validation
ci_checks.notes: Synthetic local-only status for renderer/protocol mapping; no hosted CI job, secret, token, or public status was created.

ci_checks.name: artifact hash provenance dry run
ci_checks.notes: Synthetic local-only passing artifact provenance check over fixture metadata; no Sigstore/cosign/in-toto/SLSA verification occurred.
